sidebar.clickCreateFirst: Click to create your first agent
sidebar.confirmDeleteAgent: Are you sure you want to delete agent "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.
sidebar.confirmDeleteConv: Are you sure you want to delete this conversation?
sidebar.convNoMessages: No conversations yet for this agent

createAgentModal.title: 🤖 Create New Agent
createAgentModal.desc: Each agent has its own storage, configuration and workspace
createAgentModal.purposePlaceholder: e.g., Help users review code, find potential issues and suggest improvements
createAgentModal.scopePlaceholder: e.g., Code review, refactoring suggestions, performance optimization, security checks
createAgentModal.systemPromptPlaceholder:
Leave empty to auto-generate based on role category.
Custom prompt will override default behavior.
createAgentModal.noModelConfig: Please configure a model in Settings first

chatArea.selectAgentDesc:
Select or create an agent from the sidebar to start chatting.
Each agent has its own configuration and workspace.
chatArea.clickHint: Click an agent card on the left or press "New Agent"
chatArea.welcomeDesc:
Your advanced coding companion built with Rust & Tauri.
Start typing below or choose a suggestion.

explainCode.title: Explain Code
explainCode.prompt: Please explain the codebase architecture and key modules

debugIssue.title: Debug Issue
debugIssue.desc: Find and fix bugs in my code
debugIssue.prompt: Help me debug this issue, analyze the error logs and find the root cause

newFeature.title: New Feature
newFeature.prompt: I want to implement a new feature, please help me plan the implementation steps

codeReview.title: Code Review
codeReview.prompt: Please review my recent code changes for potential issues and improvements

toolCenter.title: Tool Center
toolCenter.prompt: Show me what tools and skills are available in the tool center

input.placeholder: Type a message... (@Agent for multi-agent collaboration)
input.placeholderLoading: Click stop to cancel, or keep typing...
input.hint: Type @ to mention agents · Drag & drop files · Markdown supported

general.title: General
general.languageDesc: Select the display language for the application interface
general.themeDesc: Choose the color scheme of the application
general.autoUpdateDesc: Automatically check for and install updates
general.minimizeToTrayDesc: Minimize window to system tray instead of closing

model.title: Model Configuration
model.modelUrlDesc: Base URL for the LLM API endpoint
model.apiKeyDesc: Your authentication key for the API provider
model.modelNameDesc: The model identifier to use for requests
model.thinkingBudgetDesc: Max tokens allocated to chain-of-thought reasoning

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.fontSizeDesc: Base font size for the interface text
appearance.fontFamilyDesc: Primary font used throughout the application
appearance.sidebarWidthDesc: Width of the navigation sidebar in pixels
appearance.showLineNumbersDesc: Display line numbers in code blocks
appearance.codeThemeDesc: Syntax highlighting theme for code blocks
appearance.messageStyleDesc: Visual style for chat message bubbles

advanced.title: Advanced
advanced.dataDirDesc: Path where all application data is stored (read-only)
advanced.logLevelDesc: Minimum severity level for log output
advanced.maxHistoryDesc: Maximum number of messages kept per conversation
advanced.autoCompactThresholdDesc: Token count threshold for automatic context compaction
advanced.proxyUrlDesc: HTTP/HTTPS proxy for outbound API requests
advanced.enableTelemetryDesc: Send anonymous usage data to help improve the product

tools.title: Tools Settings
tools.description: Control which tool categories the AI can use. Disabled tools will not be available to the AI.
tools.fileAccessDesc: Allow AI to read file contents (Read tool)
tools.fileWriteDesc: Allow AI to edit and create files (Edit/Write tools)
tools.shellDesc: Allow AI to execute terminal commands (Bash tool)
tools.searchDesc: Allow AI to search files and content (Glob/Grep tools)
tools.webDesc: Allow AI to fetch webpages and search the internet (WebFetch/WebSearch tools)
tools.gitDesc: Allow AI to perform Git operations (status/diff/commit etc.)
tools.browserDesc: Allow AI to launch browser, navigate pages, take screenshots (Chrome CDP tools)
tools.automationDesc: Allow AI to control desktop: screen capture, OCR, mouse/keyboard simulation. Disabled by default.
tools.agentDesc: Allow AI to create subtasks, manage workflows, invoke skills

agentConfig.title: Configuration
agentConfig.subtitle: Model / Skills / Tools / MCP / Tasks / Git / Files etc.

profile.title: Profile Configuration
profile.desc: Define the agent's identity, goals, and capability boundaries
profile.systemPromptPlaceholder:
You are a professional AI assistant...

Custom prompts will override default behavior, defining core behavioral guidelines for the Agent.
profile.purposePlaceholder: e.g., Help users review code, find potential issues and suggest improvements
profile.purposeDesc: Agent's core mission, determines behavior priority
profile.scopePlaceholder: e.g., Code review, refactoring suggestions, performance optimization, security checks
profile.scopeDesc: Agent's capability boundary; issues beyond scope should be clearly communicated to users
profile.maxTurnsDesc: Max tool call loops per conversation for this Agent

skills.title: Skills Configuration
skills.desc: Control skills available to this Agent
skills.skillShopSubtitle: Discover, browse and install new skills for this agent
skills.defaultDesktopAutomationDesc: Screen capture, OCR recognition, mouse/keyboard simulation

mcp.title: MCP Server Configuration
mcp.desc: Provide MCP external tool capabilities for the agent

tools.title: Available Tools
tools.desc: LLM calls these tools via Function Calling

cron.title: Scheduled Tasks (Cron)
cron.taskCmdPlaceholder: Task description or command to execute

automation.title: UI Automation Engine
automation.desc: Screen capture, OCR recognition, mouse/keyboard simulation and other automation capabilities
automation.enabledDesc: Allow Agent to use screen capture and input simulation tools
automation.keyboardControlDesc: Simulate keyboard input and key presses

modelConfig.title: Model Configuration
modelConfig.desc: Configure a dedicated model for this agent, used by default when creating conversations
modelConfig.fillRequiredFields: Please fill in Model URL, API Key, and Model Name first
modelConfig.noProviders: No providers in this category yet

errors.timeout: ⚠️ Response timeout: The server did not return results within the specified time. Please check your network connection or try again.
errors.timeoutSuggestion:
Suggestions:
• Check network connection
• Try again later
• Simplify your question
errors.requestTimeout: ⚠️ Request timeout: The server took too long to respond. Possible causes: network latency, busy API service, or high task complexity.
errors.noValidAgent: No valid agent recognized. Use @AgentName format
errors.streamingTimeout: Response timeout: The server did not return results within the specified time. Please check your network connection or try again.

web_search.fetch_content_placeholder: Enter URL to fetch webpage content

plan_editor.title: Plan Editor
plan_editor.description: Create detailed execution plans before making changes
plan_editor.click_to_enter: Click the button above to enter plan mode
plan_editor.plan_description: Describe the goals and scope of this plan...
plan_editor.plan_mode_description: After entering plan mode, AI will create a detailed plan before executing changes. Ideal for complex multi-step tasks.

skill_marketplace.title: Skill Marketplace
skill_marketplace.subtitle: Discover and install skills from ClawHub · {{total}} skills total{{installed}}

codeReview.title: Code Review
codeReview.emptyHint: Click 'Fetch Changes' to load current git diff, then run AI code review

quickActions.title: Quick Actions
quickActions.clearConfirm: Are you sure you want to clear the current conversation?

about.featureAIChatEngineDesc: Supports Anthropic Claude / OpenAI GPT / Custom compatible API, streaming output, multi-turn context management
about.featureFileOperationsDesc: Read / Edit / Write core file operations with glob pattern and regex search support
about.featureShellExecutionDesc: Secure command execution environment with working directory config and real-time output capture
about.featureNetworkToolsDesc: WebFetch webpage fetching + WebSearch with custom search engine support
about.featureAgentSubAgentsDesc: Orchestratable multi-agent collaboration system with Task CRUD and Workflow support
about.featureGitIntegrationDesc: Full version control GUI: status/diff/commit/branch/log/stash coverage
about.featureUsageTrackingDesc: Token usage statistics, API cost tracking, per-conversation/model categorization
about.featurePlanModeDesc: Visual plan editor with step status tracking and approval workflow
about.featureMCPSupportDesc: Model Context Protocol server configuration, STDIO/SSE/HTTP types
about.featureTagSystemDesc: Conversation tag management, 10-color tags, quick filtering
about.featureCodeReviewDesc: AI-driven code change review: git diff → LLM analysis → review report
about.featureQuickActionsDesc: Theme switching (Dark/Light/System), voice input, fast mode, clear conversation

browser.title: Chrome DevTools
browser.noBrowserHint: Please install Google Chrome or Microsoft Edge
browser.tip: Tip: Remote debugging mode will be enabled after launch, allowing page operations, screenshots, JS execution, etc.
browser.tipManual: To connect to an already open Chrome, manually enter chrome://inspect/#remote-debugging in the address bar and enable it.

memoryPanel.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this memory?
memoryPanel.entityHint: Entities will be automatically extracted after conversation starts
memoryPanel.emptyHint: Try different keywords or check if conversation data exists
memoryPanel.usageTip: 💡 **Usage Tip**: The memory system works automatically during each conversation. You can test multi-way fusion search in the Search tab.
memoryPanel.exportInfo: ℹ️ **About Export**: JSON file contains complete data of all memory units and entities for backup, migration or analysis. Filename format: memory-export-{agentId}-<timestamp>.json

persona.title: Persona Configuration
persona.description: Define agent personality, communication style, and professional traits
persona.displayNameHint: Name shown in System Prompt Persona section
persona.constraintPlaceholder: Add constraint, e.g.: Don't proactively suggest
persona.tonePlaceholder: e.g., State conclusion first, then explain. Use bullet points.
persona.toneHint: Tone instructions injected directly into System Prompt

errorRules.title: 🛡️ Error Avoidance Rules
errorRules.noRulesHint: Rules will be auto-generated when agent encounters errors
errorRules.triggerTitle: Mark this rule as triggered (successfully avoided error)

agents.desc: Each agent has its own SQLite storage, config, skill set and workspace
agents.emptyHint: Click "Create Isolated Agent" to create your first fully isolated agent
agents.deleteConfirm:
Are you sure you want to delete isolated agent "{{name}}"?

This will cascade delete:
- All conversation records
- All config items
- Workspace file indexes
- Vector store data

This action cannot be undone!
agents.workspaceEmpty: Workspace is empty. Click above to create a new file
agents.deleteFileConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete file '{{path}}'?
agents.createModalDesc: A unique immutable ID will be generated automatically with its own SQLite storage, workspace and config
agents.promptPlaceholder: Define the agent's behavior, role and constraints...
agents.toastDeleted: Agent "{{name}}" and all associated data cleared
agents.toastToolsSaved: Tool config saved to isolated storage
agents.toastSkillsSaved: Skill config saved to isolated storage

skills.deleteSkillConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete skill '{{name}}'? This cannot be undone.

# Skill Name

tasks.noTodo: No todos yet. Let AI create them via TodoWrite tool

cron.desc: Set up recurring automated tasks using Cron expressions
cron.noCronJobs: No scheduled tasks. Click above to create one
cron.formTaskPlaceholder: Task description or command to execute

databaseSetup.title: Database Initialization
databaseSetup.subtitle: Choose your data storage backend. First launch requires database setup.
databaseSetup.sqliteDesc: Local embedded database, zero configuration, ideal for personal use. Supports sqlite-vec vector extension.
databaseSetup.postgresDesc: Production-grade relational database with pgvector support, ideal for teams and large-scale data.
databaseSetup.qdrantDesc: Purpose-built vector search engine, high performance, ideal for large-scale vector retrieval.
databaseSetup.sqliteConfigPrompt: SQLite configuration (defaults are fine, no changes needed):
databaseSetup.enableVecDesc: Enables vector similarity search for RAG memory retrieval
